rulings.Case Title: KEITH SIMMONS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of The Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant Certainteed Corporation And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, October 28, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion to compel the deposition of Certainteed Corp.¿s person most qualified and custodian of records and request for sanctions: to be heard in Dept. 206. Tentative ruling as follows: GRANT plaintiffs' Motion to Compel; DENY Plaintiffs' Request for Sanction. = (220/KF)

rulings.Case Title: KEITH SIMMONS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH GARZA et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS(B P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, October 28, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order is granted in part and denied in part. The assignment of rights and restraining order requests are granted. Rights in bank accounts are assignable (see, e.g. City of King King v. Community Bank of Central California (2005) 131 Cal. App. 4th 913) and within the broad language of CCP 708.510. The request for a turnover order is denied. (Pacific Decision Sciences v. Superior Court (2004) 121 Cal. App. 4th 1100). = (220/HEK)
